command: D="${DISPLAY:-}"; if [ -z "$D" ] || [ ! -S "/tmp/.X11-unix/X${D#:}" ] 2>/dev/null; then for x in /tmp/.X11-unix/X*; do [ -S "$x" ] || continue; D=":${x##*/X}"; break; done; fi; export DISPLAY="${D:-:1}"; if pgrep -x firefox >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; firefox --new-window about:blank >/dev/null 2>&1 & sleep 3; pgrep -x firefox >/dev/null
